data.title: Emergent BioSolutions boosts Naloxone awareness via campaign on International Overdose Awareness Day, focusing on college students.
data.description: On August 31, 2025, Gaithersburg, Maryland - In observance of International Overdose Awareness Day, Emergent BioSolutions (NYSE: EBS) is reintroducing its Ready to Rescue public awareness initiative. This campaign focuses on educating young adults on opioid emergencies and stresses the significance of having NARCAN® Nasal Spray on hand. The program will target college and university students, particularly those involved in Greek Life, wellness services, and athletic programs. Pro Football Hall of Famer Emmitt Smith and Zac Clark, the founder and CEO of Release Recovery, will spearhead discussions aimed at dispelling the stigma surrounding accidental opioid poisonings. Their goal is to encourage students to equip themselves with over-the-counter NARCAN® Nasal Spray and be prepared to potentially save a life.

data.title: QYOU Media Inc. reported positive Adjusted EBITDA for Q2 FY 2025, with 80% net loss improvement. Momentum towards public listing on BSE MSE platform.
data.description: A recent report showcased an impressive 80% decrease in net losses, highlighting the advantages of a strategic shift towards businesses catering to the creator economy. The positive momentum of Chatterbox Technologies is propelling them closer to their goal of going public on the BSE MSE platform. This news comes from a joint announcement made in Toronto, Los Angeles, and Mumbai on August 29, 2025, by QYOU Media Inc.

data.title: ATOM price stabilizes at $4.58, RSI at 50.28. Cosmos analysis shows bullish MACD momentum with a recent 0.39% drop. Key resistance levels ahead.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ATOM is currently trading at $4.58, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 50.28. Analysis of Cosmos indicates a bullish momentum in the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) despite a small 0.39% decrease recently. The price is nearing important resistance levels.

data.title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Market Report predicts revenue exceeding $480.1 million in 2025, with significant growth expected until 2035 due to quantum threat.
data.description: A report on the Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) Market covering the years 2025-2035 has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global revenue for the PQC Market is anticipated to exceed US$480.1 million by 2025, with a steady increase expected up to 2035. The primary catalyst for the growth of the PQC market is the imminent risk posed by quantum computers to traditional encryption techniques like RSA and ECC (Elliptic Curve Cryptography).

data.title: Orion S.A. (NYSE: OEC) to attend UBS Global Materials Conf. in NYC on Sept. 3 & Jefferies Industrials Conf. on Sept. 4. CEO, CFO and IR VP to participate.
data.description: Houston-based Orion S.A. (NYSE: OEC), a leading specialty chemicals company, revealed plans to join investor conferences. The company will be present at the UBS Global Materials Conference in New York City on September 3 and the Jefferies Industrials Conference in the same city on September 4. The attendees from Orion will include CEO Corning Painter, CFO Jeff Glajch, and Vice President of Investor Relations Chris Kapsch.

data.title: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (NYSE: PMT) to present at 2025 Barclays Global Financial Services Conference with PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. CEO David Spector at 2:45pm EST on September 8, 2025.
data.description: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) revealed plans to present alongside PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. (PFSI) at the 2025 Barclays Global Financial Services Conference. The event will feature Chairman and CEO David Spector and Senior Managing Director and CFO Daniel Perotti discussing in a fireside chat at 2:45 p.m. ET on Monday, September 8, 2025. Interested parties can access the live audio webcast via a provided link.
